title: Join
description: We are hiring people who want to grow with us in workforce services, HR, and BPO.
emptyStateDescription: There are currently no published vacancies. Please check again soon.

vacancies.title: Staff Accounting
vacancies.summary: Handle daily transaction records, reconciliation, and support monthly financial reporting to keep company finance operations accurate and on schedule.
responsibilities: Record daily financial transactions (AR/AP, cash, bank) accurately and on time.
Perform bank reconciliation and ensure balance consistency in books.
Support monthly financial report preparation and audit documents.
Prepare basic tax administration documents and supporting files.
Collaborate with internal teams to maintain finance process compliance.
requirements: Minimum D3/S1 in Accounting or related field.
Solid understanding of basic accounting principles and bookkeeping cycle.
Proficient in Microsoft Excel (lookup, pivot, basic formulas).
Detail-oriented and able to work with deadlines.
Experience with accounting software is a plus.
benefits: BPJS Health and BPJS Employment coverage.
Career growth opportunities in the finance function.

application.method: Submit your latest CV and supporting documents through the link below.
steps: Our HR team will conduct initial document screening.
Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for interview stage.

vacancies.title: Internet Provider Sales
vacancies.summary: Drive new customer acquisition for internet provider services through field prospecting, product pitching, and disciplined follow-up until closing.
responsibilities: Identify and approach new prospects in assigned areas.
Present product packages and explain service benefits clearly.
Manage sales pipeline from lead generation to closing.
Prepare daily activity reports and target achievement updates.
Coordinate with operations team for smooth new-customer installation process.
requirements: Minimum D3 degree with minimum GPA 3.00.
Able to work independently and collaboratively in a team.
Ready for fieldwork and target-driven environment.
benefits: BPJS Health and BPJS Employment coverage.
Career development opportunities in sales track.

vacancies.title: Store Specialist
vacancies.summary: Serve as the frontliner in store operations, ensure excellent customer experience, and support daily administration including petty cash reporting.
responsibilities: Provide professional and friendly customer service at store.
Handle customer questions and complaints effectively.
Use Microsoft Office for daily administrative tasks.
Prepare and recap basic financial reports (petty cash).
Collaborate with store team to maintain smooth operations.
requirements: Minimum D3 degree with minimum GPA 3.00.
Able to prepare simple financial reports (petty cash).
benefits: BPJS Health and BPJS Employment coverage.
Career growth opportunities in store operations.

vacancies.title: Network Technician
vacancies.summary: Handle installation, troubleshooting, and maintenance of Fiber Optic network infrastructure to ensure stable and high-quality internet service delivery.
responsibilities: Install and activate Fiber Optic network at customer locations.
Troubleshoot network issues quickly and accurately.
Perform preventive maintenance for network devices.
Prepare technical work reports and documentation.
Collaborate with NOC/operations team for escalation handling.
requirements: Minimum SMK (TKJ/RPL) or related D3 background.
Proven experience as Fiber Optic technician.
Able to work independently and in team setting.
benefits: BPJS Health and BPJS Employment coverage.
Opportunity for technical skill growth and internal certification.

vacancies.title: Retail Sales Executive (Canvassing)
vacancies.location: Jabodetabek, West Java, East Java, Central Java, Sulawesi, Sumatra
vacancies.salaryRange: Rp5,730,000 + Transport Rp500,000 + Phone Allowance Rp100,000
vacancies.summary: Conduct retail product sales and merchant canvassing, educate merchants on QRIS & Soundbox usage, and achieve a daily visit target of 20 stores across assigned areas.
responsibilities: Conduct retail product sales and canvassing in assigned territory.
Educate and offer merchants on QRIS & Soundbox products.
Maintain ongoing relationships with merchant partners.
Achieve sales targets and 20-store daily visit targets.
Prepare daily activity reports and target achievement summaries.
requirements: Minimum 1 year of sales canvassing experience.
Communicative, target-oriented, and ready for fieldwork.
Own an Android phone and personal vehicle.
benefits: Base salary Rp5,730,000 (Jabodetabek), above regional minimum wage for other areas.

vacancies.title: Desk Collection
vacancies.summary: Responsible for phone-based debt collection, reminding customers of payment due dates, and providing payment solutions in compliance with OJK ethical standards.
responsibilities: Conduct phone-based debt collection professionally.
Remind customers of upcoming and overdue payment deadlines.
Provide appropriate payment solutions to customers.
Prepare accurate daily collection reports.
requirements: Understanding of OJK collection ethics and compliance.
benefits: Solid team with clear career development path.

vacancies.title: Sales Internet Service Provider
vacancies.summary: Join as a Sales Internet Service Provider in the Muaro Jambi and Sengeti area, acquiring new customers and building long-term relationships backed by comprehensive benefits.
responsibilities: Sell Internet Service Provider services in the assigned area.
Identify and acquire new customers across Muaro Jambi and Sengeti.
Build and maintain customer relationships to drive loyalty.
Consistently meet assigned sales targets.
Prepare regular activity and sales achievement reports.
requirements: Minimum D3/S1 in Management, Communication, Public Relations, Information Technology, Computer Science, Telecommunications, Marketing, International Relations, Information Systems, Business, or Development Economics — minimum GPA 3.0.
Presentable appearance with strong communication skills.
benefits: Base salary UMK 2026 based on placement area.
